last_completed_item: D-210 — Playable-session reliability required before formal external Stage 1 testing
next_action: Ask exactly one concise A/B/C decision card selecting what the complete one-level Stage 2 slice must demonstrate before broader content production begins: end-to-end feature completeness only; near-public-demo polish; or a representative production-ready slice that is complete and reliable while also proving that at least one additional room, enemy, and weapon can be added through documented repeatable pipelines without core-system rework. Preserve the automated weapons factory, real saves and recovery, checkpoints, dedicated banking, loot risk, one shop, strongboxes, difficulty, completion, replay, scalable effects, offline Windows play, Unity with C#, performance diagnostics, and solo-led AI-assisted production. Include content throughput, maintainability, automated validation, placeholder tolerance, performance and save reliability, scope-expansion risk, and what may remain deferred. Put the recommendation after all A/B/C options at the end of the card. Begin a new persistence batch D-211 through D-220 unless the user changes the cadence or requests a handoff.
